# Audit Template Flow

This note is a path-first Johnny.Decimal fixture. Its coordinate is carried by
the path `docs/10_wendao/10.03_audit_template_flow.md`, not by custom metadata.

The fixture models an LLM-created document that followed the template before
running lint and audit verification.
